title: UPSRTC Bus Conductor Recruitment 2026 in Uttar Pradesh, India - Apply Now
excerpt: UPSRTC is recruiting bus conductors in Kanpur, Fatehpur, and Unnao. Apply online from 06/07/2026 to 14/07/2026. No application fee is required.
value_prop: _Apply for the UPSRTC Bus Conductor Recruitment 2026 and start your career in the transportation sector_
secondary_subtitle: _Get all the details about the recruitment process, eligibility criteria, and application procedure_

About Organization

UPSRTC is a state-owned road transport corporation in Uttar Pradesh, India.

It provides bus services to various parts of the state and neighboring states.


About the Programme

The UPSRTC Bus Conductor Recruitment 2026 is a recruitment drive for bus conductors in Kanpur, Fatehpur, and Unnao.

The recruitment process is being conducted online, and no application fee is required.
